text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The girls in my class were talking about<n>this place
that serves desserts and stuff.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
They suddenly decided to go all<n>together, which
got everyone excited.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
They were going around and asking<n>everyone
what their schedules were<n>like... So I left.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I don't really like sweets, so... I'd<n>probably just
ruin the mood, you know?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Why does everyone in my classhave to be so friendly?
